title: Adonka
description: A Mod About Adding Equipments, Armors And More!
body:
### **Want A Mod That Adds New Armor And Stuff? Guess What!**


This Is A New Mod That Adds New Armor, Swords And Ingots!

And Guess What? It Even Will Add Weapons Soon!

As Of Right Now, Me And My Paretners Added Steel Weapons And Items And Are Planning To Add Many More Stuff Like :
- New Ingots
- New Weapons
- New Bosses
- New Dimension
- New Biome
- Currency That You Can Use In Multiplayer

There Will Also Be Some Extentions Like :
- Adonka's Gun Extention
- Adonka's Decoration Extention
- Adonka's Metal Extention
- (All Of Them Are Coming Soon)


## Have A Suggestion Or Found Bugs? Join Our Discord Server ! https://discord.gg/BDgyrsRvXK
